WorkExperience.intranet_desc_0: Built nine frontend projects from scratch with a strong focus on performance using Next.js, including three multi-tenant applications.
WorkExperience.intranet_desc_1: Rebuilt legacy sites in Next.js achieving a perfect 100 SEO score on Lighthouse.
WorkExperience.intranet_desc_2: Integrated third-party APIs for features like parking reservation and event registration.
WorkExperience.intranet_desc_3: Resolved race conditions in the event registration system using database locks to ensure atomicity and prevent duplicate records.
WorkExperience.intranet_desc_4: Maintained and evolved over 20 shopping mall websites in production serving thousands of daily users.
WorkExperience.freelance_desc_0: Developed a responsive landing page focused on performance, SEO, and patient conversion.
WorkExperience.freelance_desc_1: Built a tattoo artist website with a custom CMS for portfolio and content management, including authentication and access control.
WorkExperience.freelance_desc_2: Led the full project lifecycle — from requirements gathering and design through development and client delivery.
